metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4713
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Immunogold labelling identified Calmodulin in both the pre and postsynaptic compartment. In addition, a further quantitative analysis of immunogold identified a selective accumulation of Calmodulin immunoreactivity underneath the morphologically defined postsynaptic density. As the CALM 1-3 genes are expressed in the hippocampus, these pools of synaptic calmodulin could derive from any or all of the CALM genes.. Experimental description: M&M: "Young Sprague-Dawley rats (postnatal day 5 or 6) were purchased from Charles River Laboratories"

antibody:
"CaM was labeled with an anti-CaM antibody (Epitomics, CA, USA) and an anti-rabbit antibody coupled to 10-nm gold particles (Electron Microscopy Sciences, PA, USA)."

Immunogen Synthetic peptide. This information is proprietary to Abcam and/or its suppliers. However the protein will recognize all calmodulin encoded by 3 non allelic genes that generate identical polypeptides.

checks.label: OWL Consistency
